title: 2026 Golden Globes Predictions from an Entertainment Editor
text: Entertainment editor Philip Mutz forecasts winners across major categories for the 83rd Golden Globes ceremony airing January 11, 2026 on CBS and Paramount+, hosted by Nikki Glaser. In Drama categories, Best Picture was predicted to go to 'Sinners' directed by Ryan Coogler. In Comedy/Musical, Best Picture was predicted to go to 'One Battle After Another,' which 'won Best Picture at the Critics' Choice Awards just this week.' The predictions cover both film and television categories comprehensively.
